---
title: "Teaching"
description: "Courses and teaching materials"
---

## Johns Hopkins University

::: {.course-card}
::: {.course-card-top}
::: {.course-code}
AMS 720
:::

::: {.course-status}
Upcoming
:::
:::

### Probability Theory I

A graduate introduction to measure-theoretic probability, random variables and integration, modes of convergence, and foundational limit theorems.

[Course website](https://yuliangxu.github.io/AMS720/){.btn .btn-primary .stretched-link aria-label="Open the AMS 720 course website"}
:::
